text:
File (TAF) claims 

FILE(S): IP line 
LT line 
OT line 

VALUES: http://www.wpc-edi.com/reference/ 
Null/missing = Source value is missing or unknown 

COMMENT: This variable has been retired; therefore, the field is blank starting with the 2023 Release 1 RIF. 

This value is null if the SRVC_PRVDR_NPI value is not found in National Plan and Provider Enumeration 
System (NPPES), or the NPI value does not have a taxonomy code in NPPES that is marked as primary.
